mapper.sql: select id, visitor_name, visitor_id_card, visitor_phone, visit_user_id, visit_user_name, visit_user_room, visit_type, check_in_time, check_out_time, visitor_status, gate_operator, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from community_visitor
mapper.insert: insert into community_visitor ( visitor_name, visitor_id_card, visitor_phone, visit_user_id, visit_user_name, visit_user_room, visit_type, check_in_time, check_out_time, visitor_status, gate_operator, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark ) values ( #{visitorName}, #{visitorIdCard}, #{visitorPhone}, #{visitUserId}, #{visitUserName}, #{visitUserRoom}, #{visitType}, #{checkInTime}, #{checkOutTime}, #{visitorStatus}, #{gateOperator}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark} )
mapper.update: update community_visitor set visitor_name = #{visitorName}, visitor_id_card = #{visitorIdCard}, visitor_phone = #{visitorPhone}, visit_user_id = #{visitUserId}, visit_user_name = #{visitUserName}, visit_user_room = #{visitUserRoom}, visit_type = #{visitType}, check_in_time = #{checkInTime}, check_out_time = #{checkOutTime}, visitor_status = #{visitorStatus}, gate_operator = #{gateOperator}, create_by = #{createBy}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark} where id = #{id} where id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from community_visitor where id in
#{id}
